settings.column_1_tooltip_html: Hem Hero® uses a clinical-strength blend of Diosmin, Hesperidin, and Horse Chestnut to reduce swelling and discomfort quickly...
settings.column_2_tooltip_html: Diosmin and Hesperidin are citrus bioflavonoids proven to improve blood vessel tone and circulation...
settings.column_3_tooltip_html: Horse Chestnut Extract and Diosmin strengthen the walls of veins and capillaries...

custom-section-2.heading_1_html: Natural Supplements that Help Reduce Pain, Swelling and Flare-Ups
custom-section-2.heading_2_html: Real Relief from Hemorrhoids Without the Mess or Side Effects
custom-section-2.list_1_2_html: 🩸 Fights Bleeding, Itching, Burning, and Pain
custom-section-2.list_1_3_html: ✅ Works on Internal and External Hemorrhoids
custom-section-2.best_for_1_html: Best For: Long-term sufferers who need maximum-strength daily support to restore comfort and confidence.
custom-section-2.list_fiber_3_html: 💨 Reduces Straining That Can Trigger Hemorrhoids
custom-section-2.best_for_fiber_html: Best For: Anyone struggling with constipation or irregularity—especially those managing active hemorrhoid symptoms.
custom-section-2.list_2_4_html: 🩸 Supports Healthy Circulation and Vein Strength
custom-section-2.best_for_2_html: Best For: Staying symptom-free – provides long-term protection for those in remission.

custom-section-3.description_html: At Hem Healer®, we believe in science-backed solutions. That’s why our formulas are not only clinically researched but also recommended by health professionals who understand the importance of safe, effective, and natural hemorrhoid relief.
custom-section-3.quote_1_html: I highly recommend Hem Healer's Hem Hero® to anyone struggling with hemorrhoids
custom-section-3.quote_2_html: I highly recommend Hem Hero® for your hemorrhoids.

custom-section-4.heading_html: We Understand Your Pain – Because We've Been There
custom-section-4.description_1_html: After 15 years of painful, recurring hemorrhoids—and no lasting relief from creams or suppositories—Ian created Hem Healer® to fix the root cause, not just mask symptoms.
custom-section-4.description_2_html: Today, Hem Healer® is helping thousands finally get lasting relief and their life back.
custom-section-4.link_manufactured_html: WHERE ARE HEM HEALER® PRODUCTS MANUFACTURED?

custom-section-5.heading_html: Studies Show Diosmin Quickly Reduces Hemorrhoid Pain and Bleeding

custom-section-6.description_1_html: Every Hem Healer® product is made in a clean, safe facility that’s inspected and registered with the FDA, so you can trust what’s inside.
custom-section-6.description_2_html: Hem Healer® products are proudly made in Atlanta, Georgia, using high-quality ingredients you can trust.
custom-section-6.description_3_html: If you are not satisfied for any reason, simply contact us for a full refund.

custom-section-7.testimonial_text_html: I have suffered for 4 yrs and tried A LOT of different things this is the only stuff that has worked.
custom-section-7.testimonial_1_quote_html: “This is the only thing that has helped me.
custom-section-7.testimonial_2_quote_html: "It has greatly improved my well-being, and my mental health.
custom-section-7.testimonial_3_quote_html: "It's the most amazing thing that I've ever taken, because it actually works!
custom-section-7.testimonial_4_quote_html: "It immediately started working and helping with the symptoms
custom-section-7.testimonial_5_quote_html: "I continue to take it, and I'm fine. Thank God, I've been fine since [taking Hem Hero®]!
custom-section-7.cta_html: FIND OUT IF HEM HEALER® PRODUCTS REALLY WORK

custom-section-8.heading_html: Find the Right Hem Healer® Product for You
custom-section-8.description_html: Not sure which product is best for your needs? Use our quick guide to choose the right Hem Healer® solution based on your symptoms.

custom-section-9.card_1_copy_html: For maximum hemorrhoid relief and long-term prevention, combining Hem Hero™ with Hem Easy-Flow Fiber™ delivers powerful, inside-out support for your veins and digestion. Pair these two for all-around hemorrhoid relief and prevention!
custom-section-9.card_2_subtitle_html: HEM RESCUE® – Heart-Friendly Formula + HEM EASY-FLOW FIBER™
custom-section-9.card_2_copy_html: The best way to deal with hemorrhoids? Stop them before they start! Combining Hem Rescue® – Heart-Friendly Formula with Hem Easy-Flow Fiber™ provides daily support for healthy veins and digestion, reducing your risk of future flare-ups.

marketing.accept_sms_checkbox_label: By signing up via text, you agree to receive recurring automated marketing messages, including cart reminders, from Hem Healer® at the phone number provided. Consent is not a condition of purchase. Reply STOP to unsubscribe. Reply HELP for help. Message frequency varies. Msg & data rates may apply. View our Privacy Policy and Terms of Service.

contact.phone_tooltip: Enter your phone number to consent to order-related text messages (order and shipping updates). Consent is not a condition of any purchase. Msg & data rates apply. Msg frequency varies. Unsubscribe by replying STOP at any time.
contact.phone_label: Enter mobile # for order & shipping text updates. Reply STOP to unsubscribe.
contact.optional_phone_label: Enter mobile # for order & shipping text updates. Reply STOP to unsubscribe.

custom_section_hem_hero.heading1: Watch This If You Have Hemorrhoids 👇
custom_section_hem_hero.subheading1: This is the answer you’ve been waiting for
custom_section_hem_hero.testimonial1_text: "I have suffered for 4 yrs and tried A LOT of different things this is the only stuff that has worked."
custom_section_hem_hero.testimonial2_text: "Please do yourself a favor and buy this."
custom_section_hem_hero.comparison_description: We believe in treating the root cause of hemorrhoids-not just masking symptoms. Here's how Hem Hero® stacks up:
custom_section_hem_hero.ingredients_heading: Hem Hero® Ingredients: Clinically Proven to Reduce The Effects of Hemorrhoids
custom_section_hem_hero.ingredients_desc1: Clinical studies show diosmin and hesperidin cut pain, bleeding, and itching—and reduce recurrence by 58%.
custom_section_hem_hero.ingredients_desc2: Clinical trials found diosmin reduced hemorrhoid swelling and bleeding by day four.
custom_section_hem_hero.ingredients_desc3: A study found horse chestnut extract reduced hemorrhoid bleeding by 94% in two weeks.
custom_section_hem_hero.ingredients_desc4: The same study reported 81% of patients had less pain, swelling, and bleeding within six days.
custom_section_hem_hero.doctor_quote: "I highly recommend Hem Hero® for your hemorrhoids."
